decision.next_gate: Use this as the no-board arithmetic gate for full-vocab rowwise top-k, then run an 8-sample replay against f32 top1/top5 before DDR3 integration.
decision.rationale: The cutout accepts scaled-score ordering, signed comparison, arrival-order-independent lower-token tie break, reserved sidecar rejection, and the conservative 46-bit bound vector.

hypothesis: The Q0.24 rowwise sidecar score comparator can be validated as a tiny deterministic cutout before full-vocab replay or DDR3 work.
